title: Why Is Arch Capital (ACGL) Up 0.7% Since Last Earnings Report?

title: Here's Why You Should Hold Arch Capital (ACGL) Stock Now
text: Arch Capital (ACGL) is poised to grow on new business opportunities, growth in casualty and other specialty lines and growth in Australian single premium mortgage insurance.
